incident_summary.title: The EC2 instance i-99999999 queried a known Command & Control server domain name.

decision_questions: 해당 EC2 인스턴스 i-99999999가 현재 비즈니스 크리티컬 서비스 경로에 포함되어 즉시 격리 시 운영 중단이 발생합니까?
인스턴스 i-99999999에 대해 네트워크 격리 후 포렌식 보존을 위해 스냅샷 생성이 필요한 승인 범위가 확인되었습니까?
VPC Flow Logs를 활성화할 대상 VPC로 vpc-generatedvpcid1를 사용할지 확인되었습니까?
escalation_assessment.approval_notes: Level 1 기본 완화는 이미 수행되었습니다. 본 단계에서는 EC2 C2 통신 의심에 대해 승인형 Level 2 및 Level 3 후보 플레이북을 함께 제시합니다. EC2 리소스이므로 인스턴스 격리, 중지, 스냅샷 조치가 허용됩니다.

reasoning_bullets: GuardDuty finding indicates suspected command-and-control DNS activity from EC2 instance i-99999999, which raises risk of ongoing compromise and lateral movement.
CSA CCM IVS-03 and IVS-06 support tighter network restriction, segmentation, and traffic monitoring for suspected malicious communications.
CSA CCM SEF-03 and SEF-06 support formal triage, stakeholder notification, and execution of documented incident response procedures.
Because the affected resource type is EC2 Instance, higher-impact containment such as isolate_instance, stop_instance, and create_snapshot can be considered for Level 3.

regulations.excerpt: Monitor, encrypt and restrict communications between environments to only authenticated and authorized connections, as justified by the business.
regulations.why_relevant: The finding shows suspicious outbound DNS communication from EC2 instance i-99999999 to known C2 infrastructure, so restricting communications and increasing monitoring directly applies.

regulations.excerpt: Define, implement and evaluate processes, procedures and technical measures supporting business processes to triage security-related events.
regulations.why_relevant: The incident requires rapid triage, prioritization, and coordination before applying disruptive containment to the affected instance.

regulations.excerpt: Design, develop, deploy and configure applications and infrastructures such that CSP and CSC (tenant) user access and intra-tenant access is appropriately segmented and segregated, monitored and restricted from other tenants.
regulations.why_relevant: Suspected malware beaconing on i-99999999 creates lateral movement risk, making segmentation and restrictive network isolation relevant.

regulations.excerpt: Establish, document, approve, communicate, apply, evaluate and maintain a security incident response plan.
regulations.why_relevant: A malware-related GuardDuty alert should be handled through an approved incident response playbook with stakeholder communication and assigned responsibilities.

regulations.excerpt: Harden host and guest OS, hypervisor or infrastructure control plane according to their respective best practices, and supported by technical controls, as part of a security baseline.
regulations.why_relevant: After containment, the affected EC2 workload should be assessed against baseline hardening and security controls because malware activity may indicate host control weaknesses.

recommended_actions.description: Higher-impact containment for suspected malware and command-and-control activity on EC2 instance i-99999999, combining isolation and evidence preservation.

selected_playbook.description: Higher-impact containment for suspected malware and command-and-control activity on EC2 instance i-99999999, combining isolation and evidence preservation.

alternative_playbooks.description: Lower-impact response to increase visibility and apply limited network containment for EC2 instance i-99999999 while preserving service continuity where possible.
alternative_playbooks.why_not_selected: Deferred in favor of L3 execution path. (Finding type suggests active compromise/malware.)
